import { TanStackRouterDevtoolsInProd, TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanelInProd } from "@tanstack/react-router-devtools"; console.warn( "[@tanstack/router-devtools] This package has moved to @tanstack/react-router-devtools. Please switch to the new package at your earliest convenience, as this package will be dropped in the next major version release." ); export { TanStackRouterDevtoolsInProd as TanStackRouterDevtools, TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanelInProd as TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanel }; //# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map
